name: Gemma 4
tagline: Current open Gemma; first under Apache 2.
metaDescription: Gemma 4 (Google), released 2026-04-02 — part of the Gemma (open weights) line. Current open Gemma; first under Apache 2.0; sizes E2B/E4B/26B MoE/31B Dense, mul…
overview: Gemma 4 is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemma (open weights) line. Released 2026-04-02. Google's family of open-weight models derived from Gemini research, for local and commercial use.
What's notable in this version: Current open Gemma; first under Apache 2.0; sizes E2B/E4B/26B MoE/31B Dense, multimodal with audio on edge models.
